'''Dressellese''',<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" /> also known as Dressellian,<ref name="Stay on Target">[[Stay on Target (sourcebook)|''Stay on Target'']]</ref> was the official language of [[Dressel/Legends|Dressel]], used by its native species, the [[Dressellian/Legends|Dressellians]]. Dressellian was a simple language that took thousands of years to evolve, including its [[Dressellian hieroglyphs|written form]], a symbol-based system.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Due to the close relations that Dressellians had with the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]], soon after joining the galactic community, Dressellian borrowed a great number of [[Bothese]] terms into its lexicon. Once Dressel was free from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces which occupied their homeworld, the Dressellians rejected their own, archaic graphic system to write their language, adopting the [[Botha|Bothese alphabet]] for this role.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Most Dressellians were also [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]-speakers.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />
